description: Sector overlay for accounting firms, audit practices, assurance providers, financial reporting professionals, and related professional-services documentation in Nigeria.

metadata.scope: Nigeria-only sector overlay controls for Accounting. Intended to be used with core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Nigerian legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Financial Reporting Council of Nigeria Act / Amendment materials
FRC Nigeria Regulations 2024 on statutory audits and assurance services
FRC Rules including ISA 701 adoption guidance
AML/CFT requirements applicable to DNFBPs where applicable
used_for: client due diligence for relevant professional services

rules.title: FRC registration, oversight, or reporting evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for FRC registration, professional registration, firm registration, or FRC compliance evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Nigerian compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, sector context, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Audit standards compliance evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for ISA, auditing standards, audit methodology, audit plan, engagement quality review, or audit evidence references.
